from sibling_package.models import UserProfile
from sibling_package.utils import normalize_email
from another_sibling.views import format_response


def get_user_display(user_id):
    profile = UserProfile.query.get(user_id)
    email = normalize_email(profile.email)
    return format_response(profile, email)


def update_user_email(user_id, new_email):
    profile = UserProfile.query.get(user_id)
    profile.email = normalize_email(new_email)
    profile.save()
    return format_response(profile, profile.email)
